checkin.journal:
Another day of sleeping good, did similar things as the day before was good, really super important to eat something fermented every day
Fizio - sound waves - focused - the new guy didnt know how to position it - exercises were pretty hard - side lifts of leg 3s hold and repeat, big ball by wall raising hips, moving ketttle bell around me 6kh while standing on one leg, + one more i cant remember
Breakfast - kombutcha 2x multivitamin, oil zinzino, yoghurt berries blueberries, spirulina 1 spoon, 1
